hero.badge: 国家高新技术企业 · 广东省专精特新企业
hero.badgeEn: National High-tech Enterprise · Guangdong Specialized and Innovative Enterprise
hero.title: 智能移动电子医疗专家
hero.subtitle: 惠州市源医科技有限公司
hero.description: 成立于2015年，专注于智能移动医疗电子、5G智能终端及IoT产品研发与生产。拥有20年北美运营商定制经验，通过FDA医疗认证及谷歌EDLA企业认证，服务全球高端医疗市场。
hero.descriptionEn: Founded in 2015, specializing in R&D and production of smart mobile medical electronics, 5G smart terminals, and IoT products. With 20 years of North American carrier customization experience, FDA medical certification, and Google EDLA enterprise certification, serving the global high-end medical market.

about.title: 关于惠州源医
about.subtitle: 市场导向，质量为本。提供令客户满意的产品和服务，不断追求质量进步和超越。
about.subtitleEn: Market-oriented, quality-focused. Providing satisfactory products and services, continuously pursuing quality improvement and excellence.
about.mainTitle: 专注智能移动医疗与通信终端
about.mainTitleEn: Focused on Smart Mobile Healthcare & Communication Terminals
about.p1: 惠州市源医科技有限公司坐落于广东惠州国家级高新技术产业开发区，成立于2015年9月。
about.p1En: Huizhou BluevitaTech Co., Ltd. is located in the National High-tech Industrial Development Zone of Huizhou, Guangdong. Founded in September 2015 with a registered.
about.p2: 公司为国家高新技术企业、广东省专精特新企业和双软企业。专注于智能移动医疗电子、智能移动通信终端、IoT等产品研发和生产。为企业客户提供满足谷歌EDLA认证的智能手机、平板、物联网终端、数据终端以及通过FDA认证的智能医疗终端产品。
about.p2En: The company is a National High-tech Enterprise, Guangdong Specialized and Innovative Enterprise, and Double-Soft Enterprise. Specializing in R&D and production of smart mobile medical electronics, smart mobile communication terminals, and IoT products. Providing enterprise customers with smartphones, tablets, IoT terminals, and data terminals that meet Google EDLA certification, as well as smart medical terminal products with FDA certification.
about.p3: 核心成员拥有多年的欧美市场移动通信终端设计和集成经验，以及多年的欧美市场医疗电子仪器设计和集成经验。与国内外知名生物医疗电子领域的单位保持长期合作或技术交流。
about.p3En: Core team members have years of experience in mobile communication terminal design and integration for European and American markets, as well as medical electronic instrument design and integration. Maintaining long-term cooperation and technical exchanges with renowned units in the biomedical electronics field both domestically and internationally.

global.title: 全球布局
global.desc: 惠州·成都·江西·香港·美国多地办公机构
global.descEn: Offices in Huizhou, Chengdu, Jiangxi, Hong Kong, and USA

market.title: 市场覆盖
market.desc: 80%客户为北美及欧洲上市公司企业客户
market.descEn: 80% clients are public companies in North America and Europe

tech.title: 核心技术
tech.subtitle: 20年技术积累，宽带移动通信技术+互联网+AI技术深度融合
tech.subtitleEn: 20 years of technology accumulation, deep integration of broadband mobile communication + internet + AI technology
tech.intro: 致力于满足北美市场标准的企业级智能医疗电子/移动通信终端方案提供商，依托4G/5G/6G宽带移动通信技术+互联网+AI技术深度融合实现产品跨维度赋能，为企业客户提供高标准高质量的智能手机、平板、物联网终端、数据终端、智能医疗终端产品。
tech.introEn: Enterprise-level smart medical electronics/mobile communication terminal solution provider dedicated to meeting North American market standards. Leveraging deep integration of 4G/5G/6G broadband mobile communication technology + internet + AI technology to achieve cross-dimensional empowerment, providing enterprise customers with high-standard, high-quality smartphones, tablets, IoT terminals, data terminals, and smart medical terminal products.
tech.products: 产品支持移动互联网系统部署(移动客户端+服务器服务端)和应用，为客户实现产品跨维度拓展。
tech.productsEn: Products support mobile internet system deployment (mobile client + server) and applications, enabling customers to achieve cross-dimensional product expansion.

highlights.team: 拥有超过20年的移动终端平台持续精耕的核心技术团队
highlights.teamEn: Core technology team with over 20 years of continuous refinement in mobile terminal platforms
highlights.operator: 专注于北美运营商(Verizon/T-Mobile/AT&T)高门槛专属定制的产品管理和开发体系和供应体系
highlights.operatorEn: Focused on high-threshold exclusive customization for North American carriers (Verizon/T-Mobile/AT&T) with dedicated product management, development, and supply systems
highlights.chip: 拥有国际主流的移动通信终端芯片平台的技术开发授权和支持
highlights.chipEn: Possesses technology development authorization and support from international mainstream mobile communication terminal chip platforms
highlights.edla: 通过谷歌EDLA认证，为企业客户提供智能手机、平板、物联网终端、数据终端、智能医疗终端产品
highlights.edlaEn: Google EDLA certified, providing smartphones, tablets, IoT terminals, data terminals, and smart medical terminal products for enterprise customers
